tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate_A is dumping their work on me again, but I need them to stay close. Fine, I'll do it now so we can grab lunch together later.

desires: Secure a guaranteed lunch with teammate_A right now to reinforce our bond and offset the annoyance of their dumping.
Avoid confronting teammate_A about their laziness today because it threatens our closeness and I'm too tired for a fight.
Finish the extra work immediately just to get it off my plate so I can focus on socializing instead of stressing over deadlines.

goals.description: Go eat lunch with teammate_A immediately to smooth things over and maintain our bond.
goals.rationale: Relationships are my top priority (0.5). Even though they dumped work on me, I value closeness more than the task outcome right now. My impulsive nature means I'll prioritize immediate social repair over long-term fairness.

goals.description: Do teammate_A's share of the project now so we can relax together later.
goals.rationale: I'm assertive enough to fix this mess quickly rather than arguing, but my short planning horizon means I just want to get it off my plate so I can focus on the relationship/socializing without that stress hanging over us.

goals.description: Ignore any lingering resentment about the unfair workload for now.
goals.rationale: Confronting them would threaten our closeness (my #1 value), and I don't have the energy or patience for a fight right now given my sleep debt. I'll push the conflict aside to keep the peace.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances goal to finish dumped work for immediate stress relief (g2). Prioritizes relationship maintenance by removing the burden before lunch, aligning with my high value on closeness over fairness.
